Populates a UserBean with the login (email) parameter from the request.
populateBean(HttpServletRequest) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.controller.GetMarksheetCtl
Populates a MarksheetBean from the request parameters.
populateBean(HttpServletRequest) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.controller.LoginCtl
Populates UserBean from request parameters.
populateBean(HttpServletRequest) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.controller.MarksheetCtl
Populates a MarksheetBean from request parameters including optional conversion of marks to Integer and sets audit fields by calling BaseCtl.populateDTO(BaseBean, HttpServletRequest).
populateBean(HttpServletRequest) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.controller.MarksheetListCtl
Populates a MarksheetBean from request parameters for use in search or other operations.
populateBean(HttpServletRequest) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.controller.MyProfileCtl
Populates a UserBean from request parameters and sets audit fields via BaseCtl.populateDTO(BaseBean, HttpServletRequest).

populateDTO(BaseBean, HttpServletRequest) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.controller.BaseCtl
Populates audit fields of the DTO such as createdBy, modifiedBy, createdDatetime, and modifiedDatetime.

Preloads required data before loading the view.

Preloads dropdown data such as College, Course, and Subject.

Preloads the list of students and sets it as request attribute "studentList" for dropdown rendering.

preload(HttpServletRequest, HttpServletResponse) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.controller.RoleListCtl
Preloads Role list for dropdown or reference use.
preload(HttpServletRequest, HttpServletResponse) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.controller.StudentCtl
Preloads required data such as College List.
preload(HttpServletRequest, HttpServletResponse) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.controller.SubjectCtl
Preloads Course list for dropdown selection.
preload(HttpServletRequest, HttpServletResponse) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.controller.SubjectListCtl
Preloads Subject and Course lists for dropdown/reference.
preload(HttpServletRequest, HttpServletResponse) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.controller.TimetableCtl
Preloads subject and course lists into request attributes for rendering dropdowns on the timetable form.
preload(HttpServletRequest, HttpServletResponse) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.controller.TimetableListCtl
Preloads subject and course lists into request attributes for rendering dropdowns on the timetable list page.

preload(HttpServletRequest, HttpServletResponse) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.controller.UserCtl
Preloads Role list for dropdown selection.
preload(HttpServletRequest, HttpServletResponse) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.controller.UserListCtl
Preloads role list and sets it as request attribute "roleList" for the user list view so role filters/dropdowns can be populated.
